constitutional_invariant: LLM proposes. AiGOL governs. Worker executes. Replay records.
selected_operation: governed creation of one replay-certified marker file

value_certification.authorization_value: worker receives only authorized worker request
value_certification.replay_value: full path reconstructable with deterministic hashes
value_certification.worker_value: bounded execution of a single permitted filesystem operation
value_certification.evidence_value: audit chain proves proposal, authorization, request, execution, and result
